title: Super Mario Bros
description: Jump into the world of the Mushroom Kingdom with this Minecraft Resource Pack! Includes classic music, characters, items, and blocks from the long-running game series.
body:
[[​THOUGH I DO NOT CLAIM OWNERSHIP OF THE PROPERTIES REPRESENTED IN THIS RESOURCE PACK, I ASK THAT YOU DO NOT REDISTRIBUTE THIS RESOURCE PACK ON OTHER WEBSITES WITHOUT PERMISSION]]

![The logo "Super Mario Bros." with a Mario-style platform in the background. One player is dressed as Mario and is jumping, while the other is Fire Luigi holding a Fire Flower.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/990f7401c57eb94d32afa6fd4481f7fdd13f369a.png)

# Super Mario Bros. for _Minecraft 1.20.5-1.20.6_

This is the reboot of my very first resource pack, now on Modrinth! It includes dozens of classic enemies, new sets of music from the games, iconic Mario items, and terrain straight out of the Mushroom Kingdom! You can find things from tons of the Mario library, from the main series to Paper Mario to even the Tennis games.

Also, Planet Minecraft and Modrinth are the only places that I, the creator, have published this resource pack. Others have redistributed it on more clickbaity sites without my permission. Let it be known, only download this pack from here or Planet Minecraft; please spread this information around, as one of the top Google results is a certain site with a "9" and "Minecraft" in its title.

Please enjoy, follow, and share!
